query:
INSERT INTO bmwLeadershipTeam (name, role, department, leadershipStyle, teamSize, priorities, background, decisionMakingStyle, communicationPreference) VALUES
('Dr. Klaus Weber', 'SVP Engineering & Manufacturing', 'Engineering', 'directive', 500, '["Production efficiency", "Quality standards", "Cost optimization", "Timeline adherence"]', 'PhD in Mechanical Engineering from TU Munich. 22 years at BMW, rose from plant engineer to SVP. Led the transition of Munich plant to i4 production. Known for rigorous KPI tracking and zero-tolerance for quality deviations.', 'data-driven', 'formal-structured'),
('Maria Hoffmann', 'VP People & Organization', 'Human Resources', 'collaborative', 120, '["Talent retention", "Diversity & inclusion", "Leadership development", "Culture transformation"]', 'MBA from INSEAD. 15 years in automotive HR across BMW and Daimler. Architect of BMW''s leadership competency framework. Champions psychological safety and cross-functional collaboration.', 'consensus-building', 'open-dialogue'),
('Dr. Stefan Richter', 'CTO - Digital & Software', 'Technology', 'visionary', 350, '["Software-defined vehicle", "AI integration", "Digital twin platform", "Cybersecurity"]', 'PhD in Computer Science from ETH Zurich. Former VP at SAP before joining BMW 8 years ago. Driving BMW''s transition to software-defined vehicles. Strong advocate for agile at scale and tech talent acquisition.', 'analytical-intuitive', 'technical-precise'),
('Ingrid Bauer', 'VP Supply Chain & Procurement', 'Operations', 'pragmatic', 200, '["Supply chain resilience", "Semiconductor sourcing", "Sustainability compliance", "Cost reduction"]', '18 years at BMW in procurement and supply chain. Managed the semiconductor crisis response. Known for building strong supplier relationships and pragmatic problem-solving under pressure.', 'risk-aware', 'direct-concise');
